name: make-ls-vscode
description: VS Code extension for the make-ls language server.

make-ls.server.command.markdownDescription: Command used to start the language server. Prefer the executable name here and pass the rest through `make-ls.server.args`. If `make-ls.server.args` is empty, a command line such as `uv run make-ls` is also accepted. Quote any path that contains spaces.

make-ls.server.repoRoot.markdownDescription: Repository root for local `make-ls` development. When `make-ls.server.command` is empty and this is set, the extension starts `/path/to/repo/.venv/bin/make-ls` from that checkout.

make-ls.server.cwd.markdownDescription: Working directory used when starting the language server. Relative paths are resolved against the first workspace folder.

scripts.check: node --check src/command-line.js && node --check src/extension.js && npm run test
